title: The Cock, The Ass & The Lion
content:
The Ass gave a horrible bray,
    Cock crowed; Lion scampered away;
    Ass judged he was scared
    By the bray, and so dared
    To pursue; Lion ate him they say.

    Don't Take All The Credit To Yourself
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Cock, The Ass & The Lion", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
